transports.label: CloudWatch Metric Streams
transports.description: Near real-time metric streaming via Kinesis Data Firehose to New Relic HTTPS endpoint.

transports.label: API Polling
transports.description: New Relic Infrastructure agent polls the CloudWatch GetMetricData API on a scheduled interval to collect metrics.

transports.label: Lambda Extension
transports.description: New Relic Lambda Extension Layer captures telemetry (metrics, traces, logs) before the Lambda invocation response is returned, enabling near-zero-overhead instrumentation.

transports.label: CloudWatch Logs + Lambda Forwarder
transports.description: CloudWatch Logs subscription filter triggers the New Relic Forwarder Lambda, which ships log data to the New Relic Logs API.

transports.label: AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry
transports.description: ADOT Collector running as a sidecar container or Lambda layer exports OTLP-formatted telemetry (traces, metrics, logs) directly to the New Relic OTLP endpoint.
